pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this filename.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this path.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this finish date.
Code analysis of verifier.py shows it checks for ANY task with ConstraintType 1, not specifically UID 2. This metadata claim is unused and fabricated.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires saving a ProjectLibre schedule to '/home/ga/Projects/jit_schedule.xml' with the Finish Date set to '2025-06-20'. The source data is a standard Microsoft Project sample ('Commercial Construction' from 2004). A metadata claim about checking task UID 2 specifically is fabricated, as the verifier only broadly checks if any task received an ALAP constraint (ConstraintType 1).
